calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Bringing Revocable Trust Under Court Supervision, Revoking The Powers Of The Co-Trustee And Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Vacating Ex Parte Order Dated June 8, 2007, Bringing Revocable Trust Under Court Supervision...
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Van Dermeer-Rupke (Petitioner); Sheila Robello (Counsel for Mrs. Van Dermeer-Rupke); Charlene Johnson (Court-appointed Counsel for the Trustor, Arthur Rupke); Nancy Rasch (Counsel for the Petitioner, Susan Kennedy).

Ms. Rasch stated for the record that she opposes the Ex Parte Order dated June 8, 2007 being vacated, but not terminated. Ms. Rasch requested that the Court deny Ms. Robello's request to not allow attorney's fees to be awarded from the estate. The Court indicated that no attorney's fees will be paid without Court order. The Court ruled that the appointment of Temporary Successor Trustee is terminated and took under submission whether the Ex Parte Order dated June 8, 2007 should be vacated.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Court Investigator: Shauna Gillespie-Ford; Bailiff: D. Handa; Clerk: C. Joy Guandique.

Ex Parte Petition For Order Bringing Revocable Trust Under Court Supervision Suspending The Powers Of The Co-Trustee And Appointing Temporary Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
